name: Create personal Docker repositories in Artifactory
name_cn: 在 Artifactory 中创建个人 Docker 仓库

name: Pull a Docker image through Artifactory Curation
name_cn: 通过 Artifactory Curation 拉取 Docker 镜像
hint: Login to your virtual Docker registry, then: docker pull <JFROG_URL>/docker/<NICKNAME>-docker-curated-virtual/python:3.9-slim
hint_cn: 登录虚拟仓库，然后执行：docker pull <JFROG_URL>/docker/<NICKNAME>-docker-curated-virtual/python:3.9-slim

name: Create a Docker Curation Policy
name_cn: 创建 Docker Curation 策略
hint: In JFrog UI: Curation → Policies → New Policy (name must contain your nickname, apply to your Docker remote repo, add a CVE or malicious package rule)
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Curation → Policies → New Policy（名称必须含昵称，应用到你的 Docker remote 仓库，添加 CVE 或恶意包规则）

name: Trigger Curation to block a non-compliant image
name_cn: 触发 Curation 阻断不合规镜像
hint: Try pulling an image with known CVEs: docker pull <JFROG_URL>/docker/<NICKNAME>-docker-curated-virtual/python:3.8 (older versions have known vulnerabilities)
hint_cn: 尝试拉取含已知漏洞的镜像：docker pull <JFROG_URL>/docker/<NICKNAME>-docker-curated-virtual/python:3.8

name: View blocked image in Curation Audit
name_cn: 在 Curation Audit 中查看被阻断的镜像
hint: In JFrog UI: Curation → Audit, find the blocked pull attempt and explore the violation details
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Curation → Audit，查找被阻断的拉取记录并了解违规详情
